hero.headline: Clerk: Complete Review for Next.js Developers
hero.subheadline: A thorough breakdown of Clerk's pricing, developer experience, and fit for Next.js App Router projects.

intro_paragraphs: Clerk serves a specific role in the Next.js auth ecosystem. Clerk is a developer-first authentication and user management platform built specifically for modern Next.js applications. The easy learning curve and 10 minutes setup time make it accessible for teams of all sizes.
who_should_use_paragraphs: I see Clerk working best for Next.js developers who want auth to just work so they can focus on their product. The 9/10 score backs this up.
pricing_context: Clerk's pricing model looks generous at first glance with a free tier supporting 10K MAU, but the jump from Free ($0) to Pro ($199/mo) is steep for early-stage startups. At 20K MAU you're already paying $199/mo, and Enterprise pricing quickly exceeds $1,000/mo. For a B2B SaaS that hasn't found product-market fit yet, that's significant burn. Consider Supabase Auth if you need a cost-effective alternative that still provides excellent Next.js integration at a fraction of the cost.
